descriptionShort: Trevor Dickie delivers part 2 of his induction speech at the 2025 BC Hockey Hall of Fame ceremony.
descriptionLong: Part 2 of Trevor Dickie's speech at the July 13, 2025 BC Hockey Hall of Fame induction ceremony honoring the 1987 Richmond Sockeyes. Dickie, a key member of the Centennial Cup-winning team, continues his remarks about his junior hockey career and the team's historic season.
